title: Certificate course in Social Media Crimes
content: The Certificate Course in Social Media Crime Investigation equips professionals with skills to detect, analyze, and investigate cybercrimes on digital platforms. Covering topics like digital footprints, metadata analysis, and legal frameworks, it prepares law enforcement, cybersecurity experts, and legal professionals to combat online fraud, harassment, and cyber threats effectively. Pass in Class XII 01 Understand the architecture and functioning of social media platforms. 02 Identify and investigate crimes committed through or on social media. 03 Develop skills to collect, preserve, and analyze digital evidence. 04 Gain legal and procedural knowledge related to social media investigations. 05 Prepare investigative reports and present digital evidence in courts. 01 Gain a robust understanding of the social media ecosystem and crime typologies. 02 Develop investigation and evidence handling skills specific to digital and social platforms. 03 Be equipped to assist law enforcement or corporate agencies in cybercrime investigations. 04 Contribute responsibly and ethically to digital safety and legal compliance in society.
